---
title: "diabetes_status"
subtitle: "`diabetes_status`"
description: "diabetes_status"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/diabetes_status/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                        | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|-----------------------------|------------------------------|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                     | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                              |
| `center`                    | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                           |
| `ds_diabetes_parent`        | ds_diabetes_parent           | string | Participant reports whether their parents have or had diabetes. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                        |
| `ds_diabetes_sibling`       | ds_diabetes_sibling          | string | Participant reports whether their siblings have or had diabetes. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                       |
| `ds_neuropathy`             | ds_neuropathy                | string | Participant has ever been told by a doctor that they have diabetic foot disease caused by diabetes (e.g., neuropathy). Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10). |
| `ds_retinopathy`            | ds_retinopathy               | string | Participant has ever been told by a doctor that they have diabetic eye disease caused by diabetes (e.g., retinopathy). Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10). |
| `ds_parents_diabetes_type`  | ds_parents_diabetes_type     | string | Type of diabetes the participant's parents have or had. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                |
| `ds_siblings_diabetes_type` | ds_siblings_diabetes_type    | string | Type of diabetes the participant's siblings have or had. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                               |

: Fields in the `diabetes_status` resource.
